scripts.dev: concurrently -n server,web -c cyan,magenta "npm run dev -w @7ito/sketcherson-server-app -- --host 0.0.0.0" "npm run dev -w @7ito/sketcherson-web -- --host 0.0.0.0"
scripts.build: npm run build -w @7ito/sketcherson-common && npm run build -w @sketcherson/demo-game && npm run build -w @7ito/sketcherson-server && npm run build -w @7ito/sketcherson-server-app && npm run build -w @7ito/sketcherson-web && npm run build -w @7ito/sketcherson-web-app
scripts.test: npm run build -w @7ito/sketcherson-common && npm run build -w @sketcherson/demo-game && npm run test -w @7ito/sketcherson-common && npm run test -w @sketcherson/demo-game && npm run test -w @7ito/sketcherson-server && npm run test -w @7ito/sketcherson-web
scripts.publish-packages: npm run build && npm test && changeset publish
